CVE-2020-13987.title: An issue was discovered in Contiki through 3.0. An Out-of-Bounds  ...
CVE-2020-13987.description: An issue was discovered in Contiki through 3.0. An Out-of-Bounds Read vulnerability exists in the uIP TCP/IP Stack component when calculating the checksums for IP packets in upper_layer_chksum in net/ipv4/uip.c.
